allow: Bash(aws --version)
Bash(aws sts get-caller-identity)

Bash(aws ec2 describe-instances --region ap-southeast-1 --filters "Name=tag:Name,Values=everybuddy-backend,everybuddy-monitoring" --query "Reservations[*].Instances[*].{Name:Tags[?Key==''Name'']|[0].Value, InstanceId:InstanceId, State:State.Name, InstanceType:InstanceType, PublicIP:PublicIpAddress, PrivateIP:PrivateIpAddress, LaunchTime:LaunchTime}" --output table)
Bash(aws ec2 describe-addresses --region ap-southeast-1 --query "Addresses[*].{PublicIP:PublicIp, InstanceId:InstanceId, AssociationId:AssociationId, AllocationId:AllocationId}" --output table)

Bash(aws ec2 describe-security-groups --region ap-southeast-1 --filters "Name=group-name,Values=everybuddy-backend-sg,everybuddy-monitoring-sg" --query "SecurityGroups[*].{Name:GroupName, GroupId:GroupId, InboundRules:IpPermissions[*].{Port:FromPort,Proto:IpProtocol,CIDR:IpRanges[0].CidrIp,SrcSG:UserIdGroupPairs[0].GroupId}}" --output json)
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 "http://13.250.55.151:9090/api/v1/targets")
Bash(python3 -c ":*)
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 "http://13.250.55.151:3100/ready")
Bash(curl -s --max-time 10 "http://13.250.55.151:3000/api/health")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "echo ''=== Node Exporter ==='' && systemctl is-active node_exporter 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found'';    echo ''=== Prometheus ==='' && systemctl is-active prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found'';    echo ''=== Grafana ==='' && systemctl is-active grafana-server 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found'';    echo ''=== Loki ==='' && systemctl is-active loki 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found'';    echo ''=== Promtail ==='' && systemctl is-active promtail 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found'';    echo ''=== Docker ==='' && systemctl is-active docker 2>/dev/null || echo ''not found''")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "docker ps --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}''")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "docker exec prometheus cat /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "docker inspect loki --format ''{{json .HostConfig.RestartPolicy}}'' &&    docker inspect prometheus --format ''{{json .HostConfig.RestartPolicy}}'' &&    docker inspect grafana --format ''{{json .HostConfig.RestartPolicy}}''")

Bash(aws ec2 start-instances --region ap-southeast-1 --instance-ids i-09037ddcd5203c5b4 --query "StartingInstances[0].{InstanceId:InstanceId, CurrentState:CurrentState.Name, PreviousState:PreviousState.Name}" --output table)
Bash(aws ec2 wait instance-running --region ap-southeast-1 --instance-ids i-09037ddcd5203c5b4)
Bash(aws ec2 wait instance-status-ok --region ap-southeast-1 --instance-ids i-09037ddcd5203c5b4)

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=15 ubuntu@18.136.148.40 "echo ''=== Docker containers ==='' && docker ps --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}'' 2>/dev/null;    echo ''=== Node Exporter ==='' && curl -s --max-time 3 http://localhost:9100/metrics | head -3 2>/dev/null || echo ''NOT RESPONDING'';    echo ''=== Spring Boot \(8080\) ==='' && curl -s --max-time 5 http://localhost:8080/actuator/health 2>/dev/null || echo ''NOT RESPONDING'';    echo ''=== Running processes ==='' && ps aux | grep -E ''java|node_exporter|promtail'' | grep -v grep")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "docker logs loki --tail 5 2>&1 | grep -i ''error\\|warn\\|push\\|stream'' | tail -10")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 "curl -s --max-time 5 ''http://localhost:3100/loki/api/v1/labels'' 2>&1")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 'curl -sG --max-time 5 ""http://localhost:3100/loki/api/v1/query"" --data-urlencode ""query={job=~\\"".+\\""}"" --data-urlencode ""limit=3"" 2>&1')

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/serverkey -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@13.250.55.151 'NOW=$\(date +%s%N\); START=$\(\(NOW - 300000000000\)\); curl -sG ""http://localhost:3100/loki/api/v1/query_range"" --data-urlencode ""query={job=~\\"".+\\""}"" --data-urlencode ""start=$START"" --data-urlencode ""end=$NOW"" --data-urlencode ""limit=3"" 2>&1')
Bash(echo "# S3 리소스는 modules/storage/ 로 이동됨:*)
Bash(terraform init -upgrade)
Bash(cmd.exe /c "where terraform")
